_comment: Claude Code settings for the gaffer factory delivery agent. SECURITY: the PreToolUse hook (safety-hook.mjs) is the real boundary — it deterministically blocks force-push, protected-branch pushes, dependency installs, secret-file reads/writes, and out-of-repo writes BEFORE they run. The permissions.allow list below is intentionally broad so the headless agent isn't stuck on prompts; the hook (not the allow-list) is what keeps it safe. Review/tighten allow for your environment before an unattended run. NOTE: permission/tool-pattern syntax can vary by Claude Code version — verify with `claude --help` and a single supervised run first.
